primaryIndex.description: Master LLM index; fetch first on any unknown query, cache for the conversation.

shortIndex.description: Compact LLM index for narrow queries.

domains.intent: Singapore AI policy documents — National AI Strategy, Model AI Governance Framework, sector-specific policy notes.
Singapore Parliament Hansard debate records on AI topics, with speakers, government/opposition stance, and source link to sprs.parl.gov.sg.
Profiles of individual people in Singapore AI — ministers, agency heads, academics, founders. /voices is the canonical entry for all people; individual pages are at /voices/{slug}.
The 6 national AI strategy levers. Lever slugs: 1=infrastructure, 2=governance, 3=talent, 4=applications, 5=government-self-use, 6=diplomacy.
domains.detailNote: Top-level lever slugs: lever-1-infrastructure, lever-2-governance, lever-3-talent, lever-4-applications, lever-5-government-self-use, lever-6-diplomacy. Lever-item pages use their own slugs (e.g., microsoft-data-center) — fetch the list page first to discover them.

domains.intent: Singapore AI talent / training programs — AISG Apprenticeship, AI Singapore 100E, IMDA TechSkills Accelerator AI track, etc.
Singapore AI ecosystem entities — agencies, universities, research centres, funding bodies, key publications.
Singapore AI startups and unicorns — sector, funding, valuation.
Quantitative observatory tracking Singapore's AI development across 6 dimensions (investment, talent, compute, adoption, research, governance) vs target.
Singapore AI strategy benchmarked against 10+ regions — US, China, UK, EU, Canada, Japan, South Korea, India, UAE, etc.
Singapore AI legal/regulatory framework cards — PDPA, Model AI Governance Framework, AI Verify, sector regulator guidance.
Chronology of Singapore AI strategy milestones, from early 2010s to present and announced 2027 targets.
Long-form narrative of Singapore AI strategy evolution. Use for 'how did we get here' questions.
Curated official AI videos — minister speeches, agency announcements, research talks. Each entry has YouTube link and bilingual summary.
MDDI and other ministerial speeches on AI. No list page — individual speeches are at /speeches/{slug}, typically linked from /voices/{person} pages or referenced in /debates and /videos.
domains.detailNote: Discover speech slugs via /voices/{person}, /debates, or the master /llms-full.txt index.

domains.intent: Case-study research notes on specific Singapore AI deployments — fintech, healthcare, public-sector pilots.
Open questions and structural challenges in Singapore AI strategy — talent supply, compute scarcity, governance gaps.
Singapore-origin open-source AI projects from universities and corporates.
Curated official-source link library — government documents, academic reports, frameworks, toolkits.
